## Summary

- Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Checks

- [ ] Ran Rust checks or confirmed CI covers them
- [ ] Ran web checks or confirmed CI covers them
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Checked Docker/build impact when relevant

## Deployment Notes

- [ ] No config, migration, or environment changes
- [ ] Documented any required config, migration, or environment changes

## Hotfix Back-Merge

- [ ] Not a production hotfix
- [ ] If this is a `hotfix/*` PR into `main`, follow-up PRs back to `staging` and `development` are planned
